description: A demo fractional asset referencing vaulted gold inventory with an emphasis on physical custody, auditable stock records, and transferable on-chain shares. The asset does not claim fixed yield; price display is derived from issuance and transaction data.

docs.label: Custody statement
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes the demo custody narrative and inventory reference number.

docs.label: Insurance summary
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Outlines illustrative coverage assumptions for vaulted metal custody.
